**About:**
----------

Unleash the terror of the toy factory with the **Poppy Playtime Grab Pack Mod** for Minecraft! Equip yourself with the ultimate gadget that allows you to interact with your environment in ways you never thought possible.


**__**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1080326/description_b87a242c-7311-4d4e-9014-838c1d6a48f0.gif)**__**

****Mod Features:****
---------------------

*   **Craft the Grab Pack**: Using a unique crafting recipe, you can create the Grab Pack. This versatile tool is essential for fulfilling your Poppy Playtime itch, in Minecraft!.
*   **Dual Hand Functionality**: Experience the power of both the **Red Hand** and the **Blue Hand**. The Red Hand allows you to destroy blocks and deal damage to enemies, while the Blue Hand lets you activate levers, retrieve items, and pull mobs.


__**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1080326/description_49280b13-c9a7-45d1-83b6-df112e8f6a1a.gif)**__
